CVE-2026-43504.title: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 throug ...
CVE-2026-43504.description: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 through 13.0.0 before 13.0.5, when mod_proxy65 is enabled. Because mod_proxy65 mishandles access control in a paused scenario, relaying of unauthenticated traffic can occur.

CVE-2026-43505.title: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 throug ...
CVE-2026-43505.description: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 through 13.0.0 before 13.0.5, when mod_proxy65 is enabled. Because mod_proxy65 mishandles access control in the activation scenario, relaying of unauthenticated traffic can occur.

CVE-2026-43506.title: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 throug ...
CVE-2026-43506.description: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 through 13.0.0 before 13.0.5. A Denial of Service can occur via memory exhaustion caused by memory leaks from unauthenticated connections.

CVE-2026-43507.title: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 throug ...
CVE-2026-43507.description: An issue was discovered in Prosody before 0.12.6 and 1.0.0 through 13.0.0 before 13.0.5. A Denial of Service can occur via memory exhaustion caused by XML parsing resource amplification from unauthenticated connections.
